div1.entryFree: Divulge, to make public, to proclaim: d. Page for a secure and wilful Actaeon, Wiv. III, 2, 43. a --d shame traduced by odious ballads, All's II, 1, 174. in voices well --d, Tw. I, 5, 279 (== of good reputation). that shall be --d, Troil. V, 2, 163. to keep it from --ing, Hml. IV, 1, 22 (== from becoming known).
